div.head: The Secretary of State to the Chargé in Nicaragua (Beaulac)
div.p: 167. Legation’s 278, December 1, 3 p.m.Not printed. While the Department would view with much satisfaction the adjustment of the relations of the Government of Nicaragua and the American Bankers, it does not perceive how it could with propriety assume the initiative in suggesting to President Moncada that he send another representative to the United States for that purpose or in suggesting to the Bankers that they reconsider their intention to withdraw.
Should President Moncada indicate his views on this subject in a more direct and specific manner, the Department would of course give them its earnest consideration.
